title: hedychium dichotomatum
intro: Hedychium dichotomatum, also known as the White Ginger Lily or White Butterfly Ginger, is a type of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hedychium dichotomatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
